message:
test(sdk): add integration tests verifying schema validation precedes side effects

Introduces ValidatingTestConnector with an AtomicUsize side-effect
counter to ensure the validation-before-mutation contract holds. Four
tests cover the critical invariant:

- Invalid JSON schema type -> FcpError::Internal, zero side effects
- Invalid value (string for integer) -> FcpError::InvalidRequest(1001),
  zero side effects
- Oversized payload (exceeds max_bytes=20) -> FcpError::InvalidRequest(1004),
  zero side effects
- Valid payload -> passes validation, side effect applied exactly once

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
